authorization.scope: Replace this with the exact owned or explicitly authorized scope before active testing.
excluded_actions: Any active test until authorization is confirmed

intent.purpose: Replace this with the system purpose in one sentence.
safety_properties: Replace this with a property that must remain true.
non_goals: Replace this with something the system does not promise.

components.name: Untrusted input source
components.description: Replace this with the actor or component that supplies input.

components.name: System under review
components.description: Replace this with the component whose behavior is being assured.

boundaries.carrier: Replace this with the protocol, call, file, event, or physical carrier.
boundaries.trust_change: Untrusted data enters the system's decision boundary.

invariants.statement: Replace this with one falsifiable statement that must remain true.
invariants.rationale: Replace this with why the invariant is necessary for the intent.
invariants.failure_impact: Replace this with the concrete harm if the invariant fails.

threats.scenario: Replace this with how the actor could falsify the invariant.
preconditions: Replace this with the cheapest required precondition.

controls.intent: Replace this with how the design intends to preserve I1.
implementation: replace-me: stable code, config, or design reference
limitations: Starter control has not yet been inspected.

evidence.claim: Replace this with the exact observation that would support I1 and C1.
evidence.artifact: replace-me: stable test, trace, review, or evidence-store reference

residual_risks.statement: The case is a starter and does not yet support its assurance claim.
residual_risks.next_action: Confirm authorization, replace starter content, inspect implementation, and collect evidence.
